shadcn-html / tag

Built with: CSS JS

Tag

A dismissible label for categorization and filtering. Like a badge, but with an optional remove button.

Component Specification — components/tag/tag.md

Native basis

<span> element containing text and an optional dismiss <button>. A tag is a badge with a removable action.

Web Platform APIs

<span> <button>

Classes

.tag .tag-dismiss

Variants (data-variant)

defaultAlternate background styling secondaryAlternate background styling outlineAlternate background styling

Default

High emphasis tags with primary background.

React TypeScript CSS 
<span class="tag" data-variant="default">
  React
  <button class="tag-dismiss" aria-label="Remove React">
    <svg>...</svg>
  </button>
</span>

Secondary

Medium emphasis with secondary background.

Design Frontend Backend 
<span class="tag" data-variant="secondary">
  Design
  <button class="tag-dismiss" aria-label="Remove Design">
    <svg>...</svg>
  </button>
</span>

<!-- Without dismiss button -->
<span class="tag" data-variant="secondary">Backend</span>

Outline

Low emphasis with border only.

bug feature docs 
<span class="tag" data-variant="outline">
  bug
  <button class="tag-dismiss" aria-label="Remove bug">
    <svg>...</svg>
  </button>
</span>

In a Card

Tags composed with .card for a metadata display pattern.

Design System

Components for building UIs

HTML CSS JavaScript Accessibility

CSS view file

Styles for the tag component. Uses design tokens for colors, spacing, and radius.

@layer components {
  .tag {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.25rem;
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1;
    white-space: nowrap;
    transition: background-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease;

    &[data-variant="default"] {
      background-color: var(--primary);
      color: var(--primary-foreground);

      & .tag-dismiss {
        color: var(--primary-foreground);
        opacity: 0.6;

        &:hover {
          opacity: 1;
        }
      }
    }

    &[data-variant="secondary"] {
      background-color: var(--secondary);
      color: var(--secondary-foreground);

      & .tag-dismiss {
        color: var(--secondary-foreground);
        opacity: 0.6;

        &:hover {
          opacity: 1;
        }
      }
    }

    &[data-variant="outline"] {
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: var(--foreground);
      background-color: transparent;

      & .tag-dismiss {
        color: var(--foreground);
        opacity: 0.6;

        &:hover {
          opacity: 1;
        }
      }
    }
  }

  .tag-dismiss {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 1rem;
    height: 1rem;
    padding: 0;
    border: none;
    background: transparent;
    cursor: pointer;
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    flex-shrink: 0;

    & svg {
      width: 0.75rem;
      height: 0.75rem;
    }

    &:focus-visible {
      outline: 2px solid var(--ring);
      outline-offset: 1px;
    }
  }
}

JavaScript view file

Interaction logic for the tag component. Uses data attributes for wiring.

(function () {
  'use strict';

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
      var btn = e.target.closest('.tag-dismiss');
      if (!btn) return;
      var tag = btn.closest('.tag');
      if (!tag) return;
      tag.remove();
    });
  });
})();
